title: solanum nigrum subsp. alatum
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. alatum, also known as black nightshade or alate nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum nigrum plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The leaves and fruits of Solanum nigrum subsp. alatum have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. alatum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and treat various digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and fruits are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
